hero.title: Our
hero.subtitle: Discover AL AROUBA HEALTH's curated range of premium pharmaceutical, medical, and wellness products — sourced from world-class manufacturers and delivered with unwavering quality assurance.

section.label: WHAT WE CARRY
section.title: Comprehensive Healthcare Product Portfolio
section.subtitle: Every product in our portfolio meets stringent international standards — giving healthcare professionals and patients confidence in every item we supply.

products.title: Pharmaceuticals
products.description: Prescription and over-the-counter medications sourced from WHO-GMP certified manufacturers. Covering acute, chronic, and specialty therapeutic areas.

products.title: Medical Devices & Equipment
products.description: CE-marked and FDA-registered diagnostic tools, monitoring devices, and clinical instruments for hospitals, clinics, and home care.

products.title: Cosmetics & Dermatology
products.description: Medically formulated skincare, dermocosmetics, and personal care products trusted by dermatologists and beauty professionals.

products.title: Vitamins & Supplements
products.description: High-bioavailability vitamins, minerals, and nutraceuticals to support immunity, energy, bone health, and overall wellness.

products.title: Medical Consumables
products.description: Sterile disposables, wound-care supplies, and clinical consumables that meet hospital-grade infection-control standards.

products.title: Baby & Mother Care
products.description: Gentle, clinically tested products for newborns, infants, and mothers — from pediatric nutrition to postnatal wellness solutions.
